neighborhoods.name: Uptown / Deep Ellum
neighborhoods.description: Walkable urban core with Katy Trail, Deep Ellum live music, and McKinney Avenue trolley
neighborhoods.character: Walkable urban, live music, Katy Trail

housing.predominantType: High-rise condos, lofts, and modern apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Dallas. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Richardson / Plano
neighborhoods.description: Northern Telecom Corridor suburbs with corporate campuses, Asian food scene, and family amenities
neighborhoods.character: Tech corridor, Asian cuisine, family amenities
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Dallas's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Mesquite / Garland
neighborhoods.description: Eastern suburbs with affordable housing, diverse communities, and DART rail access

housing.predominantType: Ranch houses, newer townhomes, and apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Frisco / Allen
neighborhoods.description: Booming northern suburbs with top schools, sports complexes, and master-planned communities

housing.predominantType: Newer single-family homes and master-planned developments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
